files.name: chart.js
index.html
files.code:
Chart-type morph

Click the buttons to switch chart types. With the optional apexcharts/features/morph module loaded, supported pairs (bar ↔ pie / donut / polarArea / radialBar) tween between paths instead of flickering through a destroy + recreate.

Morph speed: 700 ms
